source.description:
IMPORTANT: This package version requires Studio 23.10 or higher. On lower versions some functionality may be missing, or unexpected behaviours may occur.
———————————
A set of activities for interacting with Google Workspace.
source.tags: Google UiPathActivities UiPath GSuite Drive Gmail Sheets Calendar Docs AppsScript UiPathStudioX Workspace Workspaces GWorkspaces

activities.displayName: Wait for Email Received and Resume
activities.description: Wait for a new email to be received and resume the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Calendar Event Created and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new event to be created in the selected user calendar and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Calendar Event Received and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new event invitation to be received on the selected user calendar and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Calendar Event Replied and Resume
activities.description: Waits for someone to reply to a calendar event in the selected user calendar and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Calendar Event Updated and Resume
activities.description: Waits for an event to be updated in the selected user calendar and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for File Created and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new file to be created in the selected user location and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for File Updated and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new file to be updated in the selected user location and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Folder Created and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new folder to be created in the selected user location and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Email Sent and Resume
activities.description: Wait for a new email to be sent and resume the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Sheet Cell Updated and Resume
activities.description: Wait for a sheet cell to be updated and resume the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Sheet Created and Resume
activities.description: Wait for a new sheet to be created and resume the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Row Added to the Bottom of a Sheet and Resume
activities.description: Wait for a new row to be added to the bottom of a sheet and resume the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Task Completed and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a task to be completed in the selected task list and resumes the workflow

activities.displayName: Wait for Task Created and Resume
activities.description: Waits for a new task to be created in the selected task list and resumes the workflow
Remotely executes a specified Apps Script function.
Adds an event to the indicated calendar
Cancels an event and sends cancellation notification to all event attendees. Event is considered as deleted afterwards.
Iterates through a list of calendar events defined by the filter criteria. The output can be used in further activities
Forwards an event to all the specified attendees
Retrieves a list of calendars. The output can be used in further activities
Retrieves a list of calendar events defined by the filter criteria. The output can be used in further activities
Modifies and updates the properties of the chosen event. The properties left blank remain unchanged
Defines a reply to an event invitation

Handles the authentication to the GSuite services. Currently three types of authentication are supported: ApiKey, OAuthClientID, and Service Account Key. All further GSuite activities will work with the account specified here
Delete text from the selected document
Inserts text into marked fields in a Google Docs document
Finds and replaces the specified text inside the body of the document
Returns a Google document data
Inserts an image to a Google document.
Reads the selected text from a Google Docs document to use in other activities
Writes text or HTML in a Google Docs document
Applies Google Drive Labels to a file
Removes one or multiple label fields from a file
Copies a file on Google Drive
Creates a new Google Docs document or uses an existing one
Creates a folder in Google Drive
Creates a new Google spreadsheet
Deletes a file or folder permission
Deletes a file or folder
Downloads the specified file
Iterates over a list of files and folders
Gets Drive Labels with empty fields to be used dynamic in the Apply Labels
Gets a file or folder from Google Drive to use in other activities
The activity will give details about a file or folder resting on the Google Drive
Retrieves all the permissions for a certain file or folder
Gets Drive Labels from a selected file together with labels fields and their value
Retrieves a list of files and folders from the specified Google Drive location
Moves a file or folder to the specified destination folder in Google Drive
Removes one or multiple labels from a file, including its fields
Renames the specified file or folder from Google Drive.
Shares a file or folder with the specified recipients
Updates a permission for the specified file or folder
Uploads files to Google Drive

members.name: OverwriteExistingFile
members.obsoleteMessage: The ConflictResolution should be used henceforth

activities.description: Retrieve information from the specified Google Form
Retrieve a list of form responses that match certain conditions from the specified Google Form
Starts the automation when a new Response within a Form is submitted
Starts the automation when a new Response within a Form is updated
Run HTTP calls in Google Workspace
Applies one or multiple labels to a Google Mail Message
Archives an email
Deletes an email
Downloads the Gmail attachments for further use
Downloads the Gmail email message for further use
Iterates through activities for each email message in a specified folder or label matching filter criteria
Forwards an email to new recipients
Retrieves the email with the specified ID
Retrieves email messages matching filter criteria from the specified folder or label
Retrieves the list of emails in the specified thread
Retrieve a Gmail Label by Id
Retrieve a list of Gmail Labels
Retrieves the most recent email message matching filter criteria from the specified folder or label

activities.displayName: Mark Email as Read or Unread
activities.description: Marks an email as read or unread
Moves an email message to a different folder or label. The label being removed is the one previously chosen through the Folder or Label picker in a different activity
Removes one or multiple labels from a Google Mail message
Replies to an email
Sends an email message
Turns off the Automatic Replies (Out of Office) setting

Activates and configures the send automatic replies to notify others that you are out of the office. If the Out of Office is already turned on and activity turns it on also, it updates the Out of Office settings
Adds a new sheet to the specified spreadsheet
Deletes a specified column from a sheet or range. The column on the right of the deleted column is shifted to the left
Deletes a specified range
Deletes one or several rows from a specified positions in an Workbook Range. The bellow cells will be shifted up
Deletes the specified sheet from the specified spreadsheet
Reads and saves the information from a spreadsheet's range for subsequent activities like Write Range
Iterates through the sheets within a spreadsheet
Reads the information from the indicated cell for subsequent activities like Write Cell
Reads and saves the information from a spreadsheet's range for subsequent activities like Write Range
Renames the specified sheet from the specified spreadsheet
Writes information in the selected spreadsheet cell
Writes a row in a selected Sheets file using an Array column or a Data column. You can map individual fields to target columns using the individual fields option under Data column to write “+” icon
Writes a data table to the indicated range from the selected spreadsheet

members.name: RangeType
members.obsoleteMessage: Only the Default option and the Range input should be used henceforth

members.name: RangeSheetName
members.obsoleteMessage: Only the Default option and the Range input should be used henceforth

members.name: RangeNameOrAddress
members.obsoleteMessage: Only the Default option and the Range input should be used henceforth

members.name: SheetName
members.obsoleteMessage: Only the Default option and the Range input should be used henceforth

activities.description: Writes a row in a selected Sheets file using an Array row or a Data row. You can map individual fields to target columns using the individual fields option under Data row to write “+” icon
Creates a deployment of an Apps Script project
Creates a new, empty script project with no script files and a base manifest file
Gets the content of the script project, including the code source and metadata for each script file
Remotely executes a specified Apps Script function
Uploads a new script file to your project
Update activities dropped inside will be batched together before being sent to the server. Check the official documentation for activities that support batch update
Returns a Google document
Returns an array of integers containing all the start-indexes at which the text is found. Searches only inside paragraphs
Inserts text in a Google Docs document at a certain location. The action only affects the body of the document
Returns an array of strings representing the raw text in a Google document
Replaces all instances of the specified text. The action only affects the body of the document
Automatically completes a series based on a range. The range can consist of either values or formulas.
Copies and pastes a range within a spreadsheet.
Returns the color of a specified cell
Reads a column from the Spreadsheet indicated by the starting cell. Will read until the last filled cell.
Reads a row from the Spreadsheet indicated by the starting cell. Will read until the last filled cell.
Sets the color of a specified range
Mark a Google Task as completed
Creates a new task
Create a new Google Task List
Delete a Google Task
Delete a Google Task List
Get a single Google Task by Browsing, Name, or Id
Get a single Google Task List by Browsing, Name, or Id
Get all Google Task Lists
Get a collection of Google Tasks
Rename a Google Task List
Updates an existing task
A job is triggered when a Google Task gets completed in a Task List
A job is triggered when a new Google Task is created in Task List

activities.displayName: Row Added to the Bottom of a Sheet
activities.description: Starts the automation when a new row is added to the bottom of a Sheet (tab)
Starts the automation when a cell within a Sheet is updated
Starts the automation when a new Sheet within a Spreadsheet is created
Initiates an automation workflow when an email is sent
Initiates an automation workflow when a new email arrives
Initiates an automation workflow when a file is updated in the specified location
Initiates an automation workflow when a new file is created  in the specified location
Initiates an automation workflow when a new folder is created in the specified location
Opens or creates a new Google document file to use in your automation
Initiates an automation workflow when someone replies to a calendar event in the selected user calendar
Initiates an automation workflow when an event is updated in the selected user calendar
Initiates an automation workflow when a new event is created in the selected user calendar
Initiates an automation workflow when a new event invitation is received on the selected user calendar
